h29fd7745g6940g416egbd3bg71ca06047d3b: There! That's the last dismembered limb catalogued.
hf8bae7b5gab0fg40dcga101gc3ddbd241ab0: Best not to hang around. Whoever is responsible for this mess may still be here... unless this was your doing?
hb2ed88c4g4302g4519g9d6age243da76a1eb: You? Why? And how? But wait, wait - let me get a fresh quill. Now. You were saying?
h31275a2dg73b9g496agb220g7b5dc259c246: The goblins were a threat to a group of tieflings nearby. I put an end to that threat.
h6f90e846g75edg49f3g8b94gbcc654702cf7: Ah, but you must mean Zevlor and the lot! I spent some time with them myself. Kind, if underfortunate people.
h40323cf2g71cbg45b3g83c7g694871149228: It's no wonder you'd endeavour to help them. Still, it's quite an... quite an impressive cost of goblin life.
h2a17843bgb0b6g48fbga0dag700b3c2d7d92: Hmmm...Your story may be relevant, but the stench of this place is hardly suited for civilised conversation.
hd6efc05cgf768g4e48g97d2g5ded691f17e2: I wonder if we might continue this elsewhere. You've a brain I'd like to pick.
h38e544cdg5b93g4752gb5cfgadc8ce57565f: Find me at my camp - we can talk there.
h36c29a06g21eag49bdgb652gf58c4fc1ede3: Smashing! Ta for now, my friend - only for now!
h79f5e0ccg049fg4a79g88bagb83ae0ccb005: Pick a different brain. I can't help you.
he4ea4a76g30ffg435eg8166g1824b0d43c94: I'll be no trouble, my friend. Name a location and I'd be happy to meet you there.
hb6b2a2fag5483g4bd4g904aga6692ea0d7b8: Of course, my friend. But facts belong to none and everyone. Please: What happened here?
h4927daabga6eag4d92g96c7gf6888cc1c7d8: It was self-defence, I had no choice.
ha3e5f9d8gfb0dg4553gbb64gc553d648eaac: You poor soul. These goblins were spoiling for a fight under the banner of their so-called 'Absolute.'
h5a1fa3cbgbab5g4b75g96f0gbe537dddac32: Never mind. What are you doing here anyway - looting corpses?
hac16e3a3g2767g4f1agb052gcbc2c80c9cec: Just nosing out the facts. Something happened here, and it's my job - my calling - to discover what.
h4d1ecda1g3887g4a0ag91e5g7363ce92f469: But if you won't tell me, no matter. A truth is second best to the truth.
h4ee4a959g71b6g4de2g9e2bg447d39b14e60: Indeed, the poisoning was my handiwork.
hace6178dg3786g4255ga06cg1f1e49129c95: Someone must collect the facts and arrange them in a clever order.
h339b5829g3082g4406g96cfg755706556b5f: Volothamp Geddarm, realm-renowned author, auteur, and tastemaker, at your service.
hf812bc84g42f9g47feg8d1cgfecc6859f4ca: Tell me - did you see what happened here?
h7c946e03gc0a5g4ed4gaa19gaa4cd597471a: I did. I killed them all.
h9d8f1eabge667g40f8gbbeag4ccc67f47022: Never mind that - what are you doing? Looting corpses?
h12c95c0cg0341g4d76gaec5g936962e99d4a: Drat. Then I suppose I'll have to stitch together the truth with naught but my own good sense.
h7ebd3898g7309g4afeg8cc1gbbb0d77d0657: There! That's the last frothing innard catalogued.
h19ca749cge3d4g4336g942ag6d28718af869: My friend! Are you responsible for the slaughter of these goblins?
h6feb6062gb770g4c81g8e80g4b24f135d9ec: Indeed - I poisoned the lot of them.
h15dbfe28g270dg46c6g93d2g45ceaa747979: Never mind that - what are you doing, picking over corpses?
h859665c0g077cg4815g9575g290a9b780c83: My friend! Are you responsible for the state of these unfortunate souls?
